title: Routing prose: teach the 4-arg {for:'gather'} resolveTier form; cli cell execution re-routes
action: Per plan.md 2A-iii 'B4(1) prose half' (deferred from 2A-ii by the plan-checker CRITICAL scope split): update the routing prose still teaching the 3-arg resolveTier call to the purpose-scoped 4-arg form. bee-swarming/SKILL.md:96 — the cli branch must say a cli-shaped tier on a CELL returns {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only'} and the orchestrator re-routes the cell to a model tier (cli cell execution stays gated behind W9's absolute-path dogfood); cli serves gathers only, via the Delegation contract's cli gather branch. bee-validating/SKILL.md:61 — the plan-checker dispatch on the review slot documents resolveTier(root,'review',runtime,{for:'gather'}) when the slot is cli-shaped (the checker is a read-only gather); model-shaped review unchanged. bee-reviewing/SKILL.md:106 — the external adversarial reviewer dispatch documents the same {for:'gather'} form. swarming-reference.md:168 and :187 — the typed-dispatch reference documents the optional 4th param, the 'cell'-default fail-safe, and the {type:'refused'} shape; the External Executors dispatch protocol keys off the gather-resolved {type:'cli'}. Cite guard behavior shipped by ao-2aiii-1 (a cli-shaped declared tier denies the Agent/Task dispatch and points here). This closes the transitional state named in the bee 1.4.0 release note. Sync the onboarding-managed mirrors under .claude/skills/ and .agents/skills/ (self-onboard), keep every doc-contract/census anchor in test_lib.mjs green. FINAL STEP (critical-patterns.md 'shipping a lib file means shipping the manifest'): regenerate the release manifest with node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then run the full verify — --check must pass on the regenerated manifest.

truths: no skill prose anywhere still documents a 3-arg resolveTier call for a cli-shaped dispatch path
swarming prose states cli cell execution returns a typed refusal and the cell re-routes to a model tier
validating and reviewing prose document {for:'gather'} as the form for cli-shaped review-slot dispatches
swarming-reference typed-dispatch list includes {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only'} and the 4th-param default 'cell'
.claude/skills and .agents/skills mirrors are byte-identical to the four source files after sync
artifacts: grep evidence that the 3-arg form is gone from the four bounded files' cli paths
prohibitions: no change to the Delegation contract itself (routing-and-contracts.md shipped in 2A-ii)
no scope creep into cli cell-execution enablement (W9 dogfood territory)
no edits outside the bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write, never by hand)

trace.outcome: Routing prose caught up to the purpose-scoped resolveTier (AO12/B1, plan 2A-ii/2A-iii shipped by ao-2aiii-1): bee-swarming/SKILL.md:96's cli branch now states cell-purpose cli resolution returns {type:'refused', reason:'cli_tier_gather_only'} and the orchestrator re-routes the cell to a model tier, never dispatching a cell to a cli-shaped tier. bee-validating/SKILL.md:61 (plan-checker) and bee-reviewing/SKILL.md:106 (external adversarial reviewer) both document the 4-arg {for:'gather'} form for a cli-shaped review slot as a read-only gather, citing the Delegation contract's cli gather branch instead of the (not-yet-enabled) External Executors cell-execution protocol. swarming-reference.md:168 documents the optional 4th purpose param, its 'cell'-default fail-safe, and the {type:'refused'} return shape; :187 adds a Status note clarifying the External Executors reserve/verify/cap/release protocol below it is gated behind W9's dogfood and today reachable only via the gather-purposed resolveTier call, pointing readers at the actually-enabled cli gather branch for gathers. Onboarding-managed mirrors (.claude/skills/, .agents/skills/) synced byte-identical via self-onboard; release manifest regenerated via --write and verified via --check.
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs: 342 passed, 0 failed (exit 0). test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (exit 0). release_manifest --check: 142 file(s) match stored manifest (exit 0). Combined chain exit 0.
